summary: The test suite comprehensively covers core business logic (secret status classification, date calculations, report generation, output formatting) with exact-value assertions and proper organizational structure. Strengths: fixed reference date (2026-05-07) ensures deterministic tests; clear Describe/Context/It hierarchy; inline fixtures representative of real data; workflow structure and actionlint validation; act integration tests with end-to-end validation. Weaknesses: missing error scenario testing (invalid JSON, missing fields, malformed dates, empty arrays); no parameter validation tests for the main script (ConfigPath, WarningDays, Format, ReferenceDateStr); limited edge cases (zero/negative rotation days, future lastRotated dates, special characters in names); act integration test is monolithic and lacks test isolation. Would catch regressions in normal operation but may miss bugs in error paths and parameter handling.
